lessons.title: Painting Fundamentals
lessons.description: Learn the core mechanics of Pictomancer: the Palette Gauge, White Paint stacks, and basic combo rotation.
keyPoints: Palette Gauge: Builds to 100 from your base combo, enables Subtractive Palette
White Paint: 5 stacks maximum, generated by combo finishers, spent on Holy in White
Base combo: Fire in Red -> Aero in Green -> Water in Blue (generates gauge and paint)
Black Paint: Proc from using Creature Muses, enables powerful Comet in Black
tips: Keep your combo flowing - the three-step pattern builds both gauge and paint
Don't cap White Paint at 5 - use Holy in White to spend stacks

lessons.title: Canvas Mastery
lessons.description: Master the three canvas types: Creature, Weapon, and Landscape motifs, and learn optimal pre-pull preparation.
keyPoints: Creature Motifs: Pom, Wing, Claw, Maw - paint portraits to summon Living Muse
Weapon Canvas: Hammer Stamp - paint to enable Striking Muse and hammer combo
Landscape Canvas: Starry Sky/Star - paint for Starry Muse (2-min raid buff)
Pre-pull: Paint all three canvases before combat for immediate burst access
tips: Always have at least one canvas painted during combat for flexibility
Painting takes time - use downtime phases to prepare canvases

lessons.title: Muse Abilities
lessons.description: Learn to use the three Muse abilities: Living Muse (creatures), Striking Muse (hammer), and Starry Muse (landscape).
keyPoints: Living Muse: Summons creature from canvas, grants Black Paint proc for Comet
Striking Muse: Activates hammer combo (3 hits), high burst damage
Starry Muse: 20s party buff (5% damage), your 2-minute burst window
Muse timing: Use Living/Striking during Starry Muse window for maximum burst
tips: Starry Muse is a party buff - coordinate with other raid buffs
Don't hold Muses too long - they have individual cooldowns to manage

lessons.title: Subtractive Palette
lessons.description: Master the Subtractive Palette system: activating it at 50+ gauge and using the powerful Cyan/Magenta/Yellow spells.
keyPoints: Subtractive Palette: Activate at 50+ Palette Gauge, unlocks Cyan combo
Subtractive combo: Thunder in Cyan -> Stone in Yellow -> Blizzard in Magenta
Monochromatic Tones: Each Cyan hit builds gauge for Star Prism finisher
Spend at 50: Don't overcap gauge - use Subtractive Palette when available
tips: Always complete the full Cyan combo - interrupting loses DPS
Star Prism is your big finisher - save it for burst windows when possible

lessons.title: Paint Spenders
lessons.description: Optimize your paint spending with Holy in White, Comet in Black, and the powerful Rainbow Drip proc.
keyPoints: Holy in White: Spends 1 White Paint, instant cast, use to prevent capping
Comet in Black: Spends Black Paint proc, very high potency, top priority
Rainbow Drip: Proc from certain abilities, instant high-potency spell
Priority: Comet in Black > Rainbow Drip > Holy in White (for paint management)
tips: Comet in Black is your highest priority instant - never let the proc expire
Rainbow Drip also has a timer - watch your buff bar

lessons.title: Burst Windows
lessons.description: Optimize your 2-minute burst with Starry Muse timing, hammer combos, and party coordination.
keyPoints: Starry Muse Burst: 2-minute window, align all Muses and high-damage abilities
Hammer Combo: Hammer Stamp -> Hammer Brush -> Polishing Hammer (instant chain)
Burst sequence: Starry Muse -> Living Muse -> Comet -> Hammer combo -> Star Prism
Party coordination: Align Starry Muse with other raid buffs (Battle Litany, etc.)
tips: Pre-paint all canvases before burst for maximum damage
Hold abilities briefly if party buffs are coming in 5 seconds

lessons.title: Advanced Optimization
lessons.description: Final lesson: AoE rotation, movement optimization with instants, and putting everything together for high-level play.
keyPoints: AoE at 3+ targets: Fire II in Red -> Aero II in Green -> Water II in Blue
Movement: Use instant casts (Holy, Comet, Rainbow Drip, Hammer combo)
Slidecast: Start moving near end of cast bar for minimal downtime
Plan ahead: Know when mechanics require movement, save instants accordingly
tips: The hammer combo is your best movement tool - 3 instant high-potency hits
In dungeons, pre-paint Starry Sky before boss for immediate burst
